g.text: March out to Base Camp One.
Plant the flag on the peak.
Ride the sled down the far slope.
Track the prints along the fence.
Crawl through the tunnel under the holly...
Hold still and watch the gap.
Cut the first row of snow bricks.
Fit the last bricks of the dome.
Carve a window and move in supplies.
Look closely at the icy situation.
Tap the ice loose, slow and steady.
Pour warm cocoa over the ice.
Call a retreat to mission control.
Tuck the patients into their beds.
